name: agent-workspace
description: Monorepo root linking the shared agent contracts and the model-driven agent harness. The durable-agent-runtime consumes @agent/contracts to run a harness durably.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent/contracts && npm run build -w @agent/harness
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:contracts && npm run typecheck -w @agent/harness
scripts.test: npm run build:contracts && npm run test -w @agent/harness
